_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: AI Assistant chat model allowlist (per-project, with Ollama provider)

steps.description: Parse [projects.X.ai_assistant] from projects.toml and sync into Project.config['ai_assistant'] JSONB via project_registry._build_project_config
GET /api/chat/config accepts ?project_id; intersects allowlist with opencode providers; project-keyed 30s cache; preserve fail-open semantics
chat.js infers project_id from window.location, appends ?project_id to /api/chat/config and forwards directory on session creation; refresh dropdown on project change
Integration coverage: project_registry round-trip into Project.config JSONB and chat router intersection with mocked OpencodeClient
Seed [projects.iw-ai-core.ai_assistant] in projects.toml; create docs/IW_AI_Core_AI_Assistant_Models.md documenting the contract + opencode ollama provider config; add CLAUDE.md Quick Navigation row
Per-agent review of S01..S05 — validation regex, fail-open semantics, cache key isolation, label-honesty paragraph, no-template-changes
Cross-agent review of end-to-end allowlist round-trip (toml → registry → JSONB → router → JSON → dropdown), fail-open paths, cache TTL semantics, doc/code consistency, scope discipline
QV: Browser verification — dropdown reflects the 5-model allowlist on /project/iw-ai-core/, fail-open on /system/status, no regressions across Code/Docs/Jobs tabs
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
